name: desk sprout
shortDescription: tiny desk companion for long work sessions.
description: a tiny companion for your desk to keep you company during long work hours. printed in eco-friendly plant-based polymer.

name: cloud keeper
shortDescription: soft cloud-shaped catchall for everyday bits.
description: a soft, rounded cloud to hold your memories, keys, or loose change. a delightful addition to any entryway.

name: knight errant
shortDescription: detailed tabletop knight for display or play.
description: a highly detailed miniature knight figure, perfect for tabletop games or display. features intricate armor designs.

name: pebble coaster set
shortDescription: stackable pebble-inspired coasters for any table.
description: a set of 4 stackable coasters inspired by river pebbles. protects your surfaces while adding a touch of nature to your home.

name: chubby dino
shortDescription: a friend-shaped dino that fits perfectly in hand.
description: a friend-shaped dinosaur toy that fits perfectly in your hand. features a smooth, satisfying texture.

name: matcha pen stand
shortDescription: matcha-cup pen stand for a fresher desk.
description: a pen stand resembling a classic matcha cup. keeps your writing utensils organized and your desk looking fresh.
